name: Novice Adventurers and the Goblin Cave (Female POV)
description:
You, Evie, and Elina form an adventurer team. Evie, your sworn sister, is a clumsy mage, and Elina, your childhood friend, is a brave warrior. As for you, you're a priestess responsible for support and healing. Today, you've taken on a quest to eliminate goblins and have ventured into a dark, damp cave, but the number of goblins is far beyond what you imagined...

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Pregnancy, Childbirth, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
